name: P0: Assistant free-slot search then confirm create on calendar
description: Logged-in user opens the docked AI calendar chat (not the legacy modal Command Bar), asks for a free slot, taps a suggested slot, confirms create, and sees the event on the weekly calendar. Cleans up by cancelling via assistant when possible.

planSteps.description: Type demo@timeora.app into the email field
Type TimeoraDemo123! into the password field
Click the Sign in button and wait up to 8 seconds for the dashboard weekly calendar to load
If a language toggle shows id, click it until the UI is English (en) so assertions use English copy
Open the AI calendar chat by clicking the button labeled Open AI chat or Open AI calendar chat, or press Control+K / Meta+K
Wait for 2 seconds for the Ask your calendar assistant panel to open on the right
Verify the assistant panel is open with title Ask your calendar and a message input placeholder Ask or type a message
Type Find a free 45 minute slot tomorrow afternoon for TS FreeSlot Create into the assistant message input
Click the Send button or press Enter to submit
Wait up to 8 seconds for the assistant response with free slots
Verify the assistant shows a Free slots section, or a message listing available times, or a create-event preview related to free time
If free slot chips or buttons are visible, click the first free slot. If a Create event confirmation card is already shown, skip to the confirm step
Wait for 3 seconds for a create preview or confirmation controls

Click Create event or the primary confirm button on the assistant create card. If the assistant only returned slots without create, type Schedule TS FreeSlot Create tomorrow at 3pm for 45 minutes, send, wait 4 seconds, then click Create event
Wait up to 6 seconds for Applied successfully, Done, or the event to appear on the weekly calendar
Verify the weekly calendar or Today Agenda shows an event whose title contains TS FreeSlot Create, or the assistant shows a success / Applied successfully state for the create action
Optional cleanup: in the assistant input type Cancel TS FreeSlot Create, send, wait 3 seconds, then click Yes, cancel if a cancel confirmation appears
